project: LearnHub UI Color Scheme & Typography Overhaul
description: Transform the LearnHub frontend from its current indigo/cyan bold palette to a warm pastel color scheme with professional serif+sans-serif typography. NO layout changes — only colors, gradients, shadows, fonts, and text styling.
constraints: NO layout or structural changes — do not modify padding, margin, flex, grid, widths, heights, or positioning
NO component logic changes — do not modify state, props, event handlers, API calls, or routing
ALL color changes must maintain sufficient contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for text)
Preserve all hover/focus/active interaction states — only change their colors
Preserve all responsive breakpoints and media queries unchanged

color_palette.description: Warm pastel palette inspired by Category 2 Pastel Tones (S: 14-21, B: 89-96). Soft, warm, sophisticated.

typography.description: Professional serif headings with clean sans-serif body text. Sophisticated and editorial.

usage.h1_h2_h3: Playfair Display — all page titles, section headings, card titles, hero text
usage.body_text: DM Sans — paragraphs, labels, buttons, inputs, navigation, badges, metadata
usage.brand_logo: Playfair Display 700 — the 'LearnHub' wordmark in navbar

tasks.title: Update CSS Custom Properties & Root Styles
tasks.description: This is the foundation task. Replace ALL CSS custom properties in :root with the new warm pastel palette. Update the Google Fonts import from Inter to DM Sans + Playfair Display. Update body font-family to DM Sans. Update body background to the warm cream page color. This MUST be done first as all other files reference these variables.

changes.what: Replace all --gray-* variables with warm neutrals

tasks.title: Update App.css — Global Component Styles
tasks.description: Update ALL hardcoded color values in App.css. This file contains 1526 lines of component styles. Replace every hardcoded hex color, rgb/rgba value, and gradient with the warm pastel equivalents. Add Playfair Display font-family to all heading selectors (h1, h2, h3, .hero-title, .section-title, etc.). Do NOT change any layout properties (margin, padding, width, height, flex, grid, position, display).

changes.details: Find all selectors for h1, h2, h3, .hero-title, .section-title, .card-title, .stat-title, .welcome-title and add font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;

changes.what: Replace all remaining hardcoded indigo/violet hex codes
Replace all remaining hardcoded cyan/teal hex codes
Replace all remaining hardcoded amber/orange hex codes
Replace all remaining hardcoded green hex codes
Replace all remaining hardcoded red/danger hex codes
Replace all remaining hardcoded pink/violet hex codes

tasks.title: Update HomePage.js — Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in HomePage.js. This includes hero gradient, accent text gradient, CTA button gradients, stat section colors, feature card icon colors, course card gradients, progress bar colors, and decorative circle rgba colors. Apply Playfair Display to hero title and section headings via inline fontFamily. Do NOT change any layout properties.

changes.what: Feature card icon backgrounds and colors
changes.details: Replace all feature icon bg/color pairs with pastel equivalents matching the new palette

changes.what: Add Playfair Display to hero title and section headings
changes.details: Add fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif" to hero title, section titles, and any h1/h2/h3 inline styles

tasks.title: Update DashboardPage.js — Student Dashboard Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in DashboardPage.js. This includes stat card icon backgrounds, activity icon colors, chart colors (bar fill, grid, pie slices), and any gradient values. Apply Playfair Display to the welcome heading and section headings. Do NOT change layout.

changes.what: Chart bar fill and grid colors
Add Playfair Display to welcome heading and section titles
changes.details: Add fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif" to 'Welcome back' heading and section headings

tasks.title: Update InstructorDashboardPage.js — Instructor Dashboard Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in InstructorDashboardPage.js. This includes the dark background gradient, welcome avatar gradient, stat card icon colors, status badge colors, course table thumbnail gradients, action button colors, and all rgba overlay values. Apply Playfair Display to the welcome heading. Do NOT change layout.

changes.what: All rgba(255,255,255,...) overlays on dark bg
changes.details: Keep existing rgba white overlays as-is since the dark background is still dark (warm brown instead of blue)

changes.what: Add Playfair Display to welcome heading
changes.details: Add fontFamily to the 'Welcome back, ...' heading

tasks.title: Update CourseDetailPage.js — Course Detail Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in CourseDetailPage.js. This includes course header gradient, instructor avatar gradient, enrollment button colors, level badge colors, video modal colors, and any other hardcoded hex or rgba values. Apply Playfair Display to course title. Do NOT change layout.

changes.details: These use var(--primary) and var(--success) — will inherit from T1. Verify no hardcoded overrides.

changes.what: Add Playfair Display to course title
changes.details: Add fontFamily to the course title heading

tasks.title: Update CourseBuilderPage.js & NewCoursePage.js — Instructor Form Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in CourseBuilderPage.js and NewCoursePage.js. These pages likely use instructor-themed colors (purple/indigo inline styles). Replace with warm pastel equivalents. Apply Playfair Display to page headings. Do NOT change layout.

changes.what: Form accent colors and focus states
changes.details: Ensure form inputs use warm pastel focus ring colors
Replace any hardcoded action colors with palette equivalents

changes.what: Add Playfair Display to page title headings
changes.details: Add fontFamily to the main heading of each page

tasks.title: Update Navbar.js & LoginPage.js — Navigation & Auth Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in Navbar.js (instructor role badge #6C63FF) and LoginPage.js (any hardcoded colors). Apply Playfair Display to the brand wordmark 'LearnHub' in the navbar and 'Welcome Back' heading on login page. Do NOT change layout.

changes.what: Instructor role badge color in Navbar

changes.details: Add fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif" and fontWeight: 700 to the 'LearnHub' text in Navbar
Add Playfair Display to 'Welcome Back' heading
Ensure colors reference CSS variables (will inherit from T1)

tasks.title: Update LearningChatbot.js — Chatbot Widget Inline Styles
tasks.description: Replace ALL hardcoded inline style colors in the chatbot component. This includes the FAB button gradient, chat header gradient, user message bubble gradient, bot avatar gradient, and any other hardcoded colors. Do NOT change layout.

tasks.title: Final Verification & Consistency Audit
tasks.description: After all other tasks are complete, perform a full grep audit of the entire frontend/src directory for any remaining old color values. Search for: #6366f1, #4f46e5, #818cf8, #8b5cf6, #0ea5e9, #0284c7, #f59e0b, #ef4444, #1e1b4b, #312e81, #4338ca, #6C63FF, #ec4899, #06b6d4, #10b981. Replace any remaining instances. Verify the frontend compiles without errors using 'npx react-scripts build'. Verify no layout changes were introduced by checking that no margin, padding, width, height, flex, grid, or position values were modified.
checks: npx react-scripts build — should compile successfully
Verify all pages render correctly with warm pastel colors
Verify text contrast meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 ratio minimum)

execution_order.reason: CSS variables must be updated first — all components reference them
App.css global styles must be updated before component-specific changes
All component inline style changes can be done in parallel after CSS foundation is set
Final audit must run after all changes are complete
